awards.title: Men's Wildcard
awards.subtitle: Biggest swing between workouts
awards.name: Roice Gummer
awards.detail: Range: 31 percentile points between best and worst

awards.title: Men's Metronome
awards.subtitle: Most consistent across all 3 workouts
awards.name: John Healey
awards.detail: Volatility: 0.8 — nearly the same percentile every week

awards.title: Women's Wildcard
awards.subtitle: Biggest swing between workouts
awards.name: Ally McDonagh-White
awards.detail: Range: 19 percentile points between best and worst

awards.title: Women's Metronome
awards.subtitle: Most consistent across all 3 workouts
awards.name: Rebecca Knight
awards.detail: Volatility: 1.2 — nearly the same percentile every week
